commands.repair_reason: - [P2] No repair lane is needed because the diff is a coherent one-file lockfile update and the remaining action is routine validation and merge policy.; Cleared: The diff only updates a dev-only DefinitelyTyped package resolution and integrity in pnpm-lock.yaml; it does not add scripts, workflows, production dependencies, permissions, or downloaded executables. commands.review_summary:
This PR refreshes `pnpm-lock.yaml` so `@types/node` resolves to 25.9.2 and updates the related Vite/Vitest peer snapshot keys while leaving `package.json` at `^25.9.1`.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is dependency maintenance, not a behavioral bug. Source inspection shows current main still resolves 25.9.1 while the PR resolves 25.9.2.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane is needed because the diff is a coherent one-file lockfile update and the remaining action is routine validation and merge policy.

Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
